title: Finding silence in Langtang
excerpt: A week above the tree line — on walking alone, altitude, and the quiet politics of solitude for a woman in the mountains.

title: When advocacy is also art
excerpt: Notes on live painting at a Ministry of Health event — and what happens to a policy room when ink lands on paper in front of it.

title: Why I'm applying to an MPH at 29
excerpt: On coming back to a classroom after five years of fieldwork — and what I'm hoping to borrow, question, and eventually give back.
